title: Liber AL vel Legis
author: Aleister Crowley
description: The received text that opens Crowley's Thelemic system and frames the Cairo Working.

title: Book 4 / Liber ABA
author: Aleister Crowley
description: Crowley's instructional manual on yoga, magick, and the disciplined training life.

title: The Vision and the Voice
author: Aleister Crowley
description: Record of the thirty Enochian Aethyrs worked in Algeria with Victor Neuburg.

author: Aleister Crowley
description: Crowley's correspondence tables and Qabalistic reference work.

title: The Book of Thoth
author: Aleister Crowley
description: Crowley's late tarot manual for the Thoth deck and its symbolic revisions.

author: Aleister Crowley
description: The first issue of Crowley's magical journal, with instruction, ritual, and polemic.

title: The Book of Lies
author: Aleister Crowley
description: Short symbolic chapters, jokes, aphorisms, and doctrinal reversals.

title: Liber Aleph vel CXI
author: Aleister Crowley
description: Crowley's letter-form work of magical instruction addressed to his magical son.

title: The Blue Equinox
author: Aleister Crowley
description: Later issue of The Equinox and a major post-war manifesto volume.

title: Magick in Theory and Practice
author: Aleister Crowley
description: A major statement of Crowley's magical theory and practical method.

title: The Confessions of Aleister Crowley
author: Aleister Crowley
description: Crowley's autobiographical life story, written as a self-interpreting narrative.

title: Diary of a Drug Fiend
author: Aleister Crowley
